mainEntity.name: Attorney contingency fees for Idaho occupational illness claims?
mainEntity.text: Attorney contingency fees for Idaho occupational illness claims?

acceptedAnswer.text: Idaho caps fees at 25% for disputed occupational claims, court-approved from benefits.[1]

suggestedAnswer.text: Boise standards align Utah. No win, no fee. Cross-state Murray firms disclose splits.[1]
